items.name: check_naming
items.signature: pub fn check_naming( file_ctx: &FileContext, lines: &[&str], _cfg: &Config, issues: &mut Vec<Issue>, path: &Path, )
items.doc: Check C++ naming conventions: PascalCase classes, snake_case/camelCase functions.

items.name: check_doc_required
items.signature: pub fn check_doc_required( file_ctx: &FileContext, lines: &[&str], _cfg: &Config, issues: &mut Vec<Issue>, path: &Path, )
items.doc: Check C++ public items have doc comments.

items.name: check_safety
items.signature: pub fn check_safety( file_ctx: &FileContext, lines: &[&str], _cfg: &Config, issues: &mut Vec<Issue>, path: &Path, )
items.doc: Check for raw memory management — prefer smart pointers.
